welcome.title:
Welcome to
RestEasy
welcome.subtitle: A clinically proven program to help you sleep again. No trackers. No scores. Just science.
welcome.disclaimer: Based on Cognitive Behavioral Therapy for Insomnia (CBT-I)

journal.title: Morning Journal
journal.subtitle: How was your night?
journal.bedtime_question: What time did you go to bed?
journal.fall_asleep_question: How long did it take to fall asleep?
journal.wakeups_question: How many times did you wake up?
journal.wake_time_question: What time did you wake up?
journal.out_of_bed_question: What time did you get out of bed?

weekly.title: Week {{week}} Review
weekly.subtitle: Your sleep journey this week
weekly.window_same: Your sleep window stays the same this week
weekly.window_extended: Your sleep window is extended by 15 min this week
weekly.window_reduced: Your sleep window is reduced by 15 min this week

night.title: Night Mode
night.reminder: Remember: if you're not asleep in 20 minutes, it's okay to get up
night.get_up_text: Go to another room. Do something calm until you feel sleepy. Return to bed only when you feel drowsy.

s1_sleep_education.title: Understanding Sleep
s1_sleep_education.description: The basics of sleep biology and why insomnia develops.

s2_sleep_restriction.title: Sleep Restriction
s2_sleep_restriction.description: How and why reducing time in bed improves sleep quality.

s4_stimulus_control.title: Stimulus Control
s4_stimulus_control.description: Re-associating your bed with sleep, not wakefulness.

s5_relaxation.title: Relaxation Techniques
s5_relaxation.description: Breathing, progressive muscle relaxation and mindfulness.

s6_relapse_prevention.title: Relapse Prevention
s6_relapse_prevention.description: Maintaining your gains and managing bad nights.

onboarding.name_question: What would you like to be called?
onboarding.wake_time_question:
What time do you usually wake up?
Try to keep it consistent even on weekends.
onboarding.wake_time_tip: 💡 A fixed wake time is the most important rule in CBT-I.
onboarding.time_in_bed_question: How many hours do you usually spend in bed?
onboarding.time_in_bed_tip: 💡 CBT-I starts with a slightly restricted sleep window to consolidate your sleep.

error_boundary.title: Something went wrong
error_boundary.subtitle: An unexpected error occurred. Our team has been notified.
